final_prompt.prompt:

Subject: must include a young woman resembling 神仙姐姐 holding a handwritten sign in front of her
Scene/backdrop: needs a typical indoor live-stream room atmosphere — exact background treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, well-lit live-stream studio atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
